text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
An exhibition race has been proposed to give
popular Umamusume the opportunity to show
their full potential—the Gekkei Hai.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Tachyon, the tireless pursuer of
Umamusume potential, has also received an
invitation.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With this many talented runners, it's a prime
opportunity for collecting data. However, Agnes
Tachyon struggles to decide if she should enter.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She goes out later that night for a run. Somewhat
resigned, she makes a choice for her future.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The next day, she conveys to me her intention to
run in the Gekkei Hai.
